notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas grounds into a force out, shortstop Tristan Gray to second baseman Royce Lewis. Maikel Garcia out at 2nd. Lane Thomas advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas singles on a fly ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler, deflected by left fielder Trevor Larnach. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Trevor Larnach GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trevor Larnach grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Ryan Kreidler out at 2nd. Trevor Larnach out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, pitcher Luinder Avila to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Royce Lewis out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds into a double play, pitcher Luinder Avila to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Royce Lewis out at 2nd. Ryan Kreidler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Luke Keaschall pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luke Keaschall pops out to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Orlando Arcia pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Orlando Arcia homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
